scripts.dev: concurrently --kill-others "npm run dev -w backend" "npm run dev -w frontend"
scripts.dev:bun: concurrently "bun run --filter=backend dev:bun" "npm run dev -w frontend"
scripts.build: npm run build -w shared && npm run build -w frontend && npm run build -w backend
scripts.build:bun: bun run --filter=shared build && bun run --filter=frontend build
